patterns.description: DROP TABLE or DROP DATABASE commands
patterns.safer_alternative: Rename the table first (ALTER TABLE ... RENAME TO ..._backup) and verify before dropping
Use DELETE with a WHERE clause for selective deletion, or back up the table first
Always include a WHERE clause. Run SELECT with the same WHERE first to preview affected rows
Create a migration that is reversible. Back up the column data before dropping
Review the pending migration files first, ensure they are reversible, and back up the database

patterns.description: Database restore commands that overwrite existing data
patterns.safer_alternative: Restore to a separate database/schema first, verify the data, then swap
